title: Engen York: Part of the community, and fuelling it
description: BUSINESS NEWS - At Engen York Convenience...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - At Engen York Convenience Centre, we’re more than just a filling station - we’re your one-stop destination for quality fuel, everyday essentials and friendly service that feels like home.

Proudly serving our community, we combine convenience with care, offering everything from the best tramezzinis and coffee to Woolworths’ quality and Quickshop’s convenience, all under one roof.


> Being nominated for this award is an incredible honour.


It reflects the hard work of our team and the loyalty of our customers who continue to support us. This recognition reinforces our commitment to delivering outstanding service, value and reliability.

Our message is simple: We’re here for you - day in and day out.

Whether you’re topping up your tank, grabbing a quick bite or picking up essentials, we aim to make every visit fast, friendly and fulfilling.

What sets us apart is our unwavering focus on community, consistency and customer first values. In a competitive market, we stay ahead by listening to our customers, embracing innovation and always going the extra mile.

We believe we should win this nomination because we don’t just serve a community - we’re a part of it. And we’re committed to fuelling it, one customer at a time.


> Vote here: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/george/best-of-george-vote/


https://tgmotors.co.za/

Engen York Convenience Centre’s friendly staff from the forecourt, bakery, barista, cashiers and supervisors celebrating their first birthday in April. Thanks to all our loyal customers for this milestone!

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
